body: Window flash fixed permanently. Root cause: Windows creates a console window before pwsh -WindowStyle Hidden can suppress it. Fix: scheduled task now runs via wscript.exe (a GUI host that never creates a console window) which invokes a VBScript launcher at C:\Users\User\launch-relay.vbs with window style 0 (fully hidden). Task action: wscript.exe //B //NoLogo launch-relay.vbs relay-listener.ps1. Live run confirmed: LastTaskResult=0. Source install-relay-listener.ps1 updated at Desktop source location. All future re-installs will be flash-free automatically.
